free_text: Elastic and inelastic scattering of alpha-particles
at 29, 38 and 50.5 MeV by even-numbered zinc isotopes
N.N.Pavlova et al., "Tables of differential elastic
and inelastic scattering of alpha-particles from 30
to 50 MeV with Z=6 to 30 nuclides", Preprint,
Self-supporting targets of enriched zinc isotopes with
the thickness of about 1.5 mg/cm2 were used.
No information on the source of uncertainty
